rules.name: Zero Em Dashes
rules.description: Em dashes and en dashes are not allowed. Replace with commas, periods, colons, semicolons, or restructure the sentence.

rules.name: Zero Anaphoric Triples
rules.description: Three or more consecutive sentences sharing the same opening word. Vary the openings or combine into flowing prose.

rules.name: Zero Staccato Fragments
rules.description: Two or more consecutive sentences of three words or fewer. Combine into flowing prose with commas, colons, or semicolons.

rules.name: Verify Claims
rules.description: Specific factual claim detected. Verify the source before publishing.
